rationale: The cited work is not just listed as general background; it is used for a specific methodological role in the citing paper's discussion of choice deferral. When reporting an additional test with a no-choice alternative, the authors explicitly cite Dhar and Nowlis (2004) as the basis for using a cash option to operationalize avoiding choice. This is a concrete, functional use of the prior paper, even though it is peripheral to the four core studies.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Dhar and Nowlis (2004) as methodological precedent for measuring deferral with a no-choice/cash option in an auxiliary analysis of its own framework. It transfers that operationalization to test deferral implications of mental representation and choice comparability.
